channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Cobalt Strike — 10 new IOCs detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Quasar RAT — 10 new IOCs detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: BitRAT — 1 new IOC detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with bitrat .
